content:
ATTN: ALL VOLUNTEERS, ALL LANGUAGES
I figured I should keep track of what is and isn't ready in my public repo here, so you guys can know how it's going.

If you haven't heard the chatter about it, I'm hoping everyone can move over to my contribution system to make things smoother on everyone. Here's a link to the repo, instructions on how to use it should be as simple as possible, and in the README!
https://github.com/omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination

embeds.title: GitHub - omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination
embeds.description: Contribute to omnichromia/morimens-volunteer-coordination development by creating an account on GitHub.

content:

Here's my to-do of chunks I'm aware I can put together. Will be updated over time.
